text: There is a surreal stillness enveloping this empty, modern hallway; the geometry and polished surfaces accentuate my sense of detachment. As I turn into the vibrant R+D exhibition, thought-provoking words about the intersection of humanity and technology beckon me. I feel like a silent observer at the edge of a transformation, inspired and curious, but also aware of my own isolation in this space of potential and inquiry. Beauty and unease mingle as I contemplate my place within these evolving patterns of existence.
